title: All except blocks should be able to catch exceptions
description: This rule checks that all functions in the project are either decorated with @contextmanager or have an except block to handle exceptions.
message: Function '{{ function_name }}' does not have a catch block or is not decorated with @contextmanager.
impact: Function may crash the application if an exception is raised.
recommendation: Add an except block or decorate the function with @contextmanager.

compliant.code:
import contextlib
def foo():
    with contextlib.suppress(Exception):
        print('Hello')

why_is_this_an_issue: Functions without exception handling may lead to unhandled exceptions causing the application to crash.
how_to_fix: Add an except block or decorate the function with @contextmanager.
